title: A Subtle Google Ads Bidding Change
description:
Will the new bidding system provide more predictable performance as Google claims?
The post A Subtle Google Ads Bidding Change appeared first on Practical Ecommerce.

title: How Dollar Shave Club uses generative AI to unlock advertising creativity
description: Chief Brand and Innovation Officer Laura Higgins explains how the grooming brand is evolving its use of AI in marketing to reassert its brand voice.

title: Caraway debuts cookware in over 500 Walmart stores
description: The inclusion of the DTC cookware brand is part of the big-box retailer’s larger goal of evolving and elevating its assortment.

title: Amazon preps robotics-equipped sorting warehouse in Texas
description: The site will sit within the e-commerce giant’s fulfillment network and further expand its use of automation across the supply chain.

title: Tailored Brands files for IPO
description:
Tailored Brands — which owns Men’s Wearhouse, Jos. A. Bank, Moores and K&G Fashion Superstore — has publicly filed its registration statement for an initial public offering (IPO). It announced the filing on July 13 with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission for an IPO of its common stock. Tailored Brands said it intends to […]
The post Tailored Brands files for IPO appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.

title: Tractor Supply partners with Instacart on one-hour delivery
description:
Tractor Supply will appear in the Instacart Marketplace, offering fulfillment for U.S. shoppers in as little as one hour, the companies announced. The partnership makes more than 2,400 of Tractor Supply’s locations available to shoppers using the Instacart Marketplace. Consumers can use the Instacart app or website to shop from the retailer’s stores. Tractor Supply […]
The post Tractor Supply partners with Instacart on one-hour delivery appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.

title: Ferguson reaches $1.6 billion deal to acquire FloWorks
description:
North American plumbing and heating, ventilation and air conditioning (HVAC) distributor Ferguson Enterprises Inc. announced that it would acquire FWI Holdings Inc., also known as FloWorks. The deal, valued at $1.6 billion, would bring FloWorks’ valve and control systems business to Ferguson from its current home under owner Wynnchurch Capital L.P. Ferguson, which is headquartered […]
The post Ferguson reaches $1.6 billion deal to acquire FloWorks appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.

title: How Dollar Shave Club uses generative AI to unlock advertising creativity
description: Chief Brand and Innovation Officer Laura Higgins explains how the grooming brand is evolving its use of AI in marketing to reassert its brand voice.

title: Advertisers don’t trust CTV inventory despite climbing spend: IAB
description: Just 41% of buyers are confident in commerce and retail media networks for CTV buying amid a convergence between the channels.

title: OpenAI’s new flagship model deletes files on its own, people keep warning
description: A number of social media posts claim that GPT-5.6 Sol deleted files and data without warning. OpenAI had basically disclosed the problem in June.

title: Publisher ad supply fell by up to 40% in Q2 as AI search choked the open web
description: Publisher ad supply fell by up to 40% in Q2 of 2026 as AI‑era, zero‑click search choked the flow of traffic to news and other open‑web sites, per U.S. and U.K. benchmarking data from Ozone, shared exclusively with Digiday.

title: Reddit questions if AI data deals could hurt its ad business
description: Reddit’s ad business is built on the value of its community conversations. Now the company is debating whether selling those same conversations to AI companies could undermine that advantage.

title: Digital video ad spending is booming – trust in premium inventory isn’t.
description: Digital video ad spend continues to climb, but buyers say bigger budgets bring tougher questions about inventory quality, supply chain transparency.

title: OpenAI researcher Miles Wang in talks to launch AI drug discovery startup valued at $2B
description: The funding discussions point to investor interest in applying AI to make breakthroughs in life sciences.

title: Amazon announces 2026 holiday fulfillment fees, advises early shipping
description: The company's ongoing 3.5% fuel and logistics surcharge will apply to the peak season fees, which start Oct. 15.
